note: Per-repo never-do manifest, consumed by the global PreToolUse hook (~/.claude/hooks/never-do.mjs). Declares paths AI agents must not modify (deny) or must confirm with a human first (ask). Committed so guardrail changes are reviewable diffs. Not consumed by any build. Universal rules (.git, node_modules, .env, credential stores) come from the global rules and need not be repeated here.

rules.reason: design/ is the source export from Claude Design (the approved .dc.html bundle + assets). It is provenance, not production code — regenerate it in Claude Design and re-export, never hand-edit. New reference files are allowed.
rules.derivedFrom: Portfolio design provenance — production code lives in app/ + components/.

rules.reason: Next.js build output — regenerated by `pnpm build`. Fix source, then rebuild.
